name: managed-ha-opentofu-state-proof
network_audience: replace-me: tailnet operators or repo-managed proof runner audience
credential_source: replace-me: dedicated state-only secret authority; no Attic, Bazel, BCR, RBE, or CAS credentials
rotation_owner: replace-me: team or operator group that owns credential rotation
restore_owner: replace-me: team or operator group that owns state restore tests
scratch_bucket_policy: replace-me: allow create/list/read/write/delete for darkmap-ha-state-proof only
deny tofu-state and protected stack prefixes

bucket_recovery.versioning: replace-me: enabled or equivalent object-generation history
bucket_recovery.retention_or_backup: replace-me: retained backup independent from Attic and Bazel cache storage
bucket_recovery.restore_test: replace-me: scratch and disposable OpenTofu restore test method

state_locking: OpenTofu S3 backend use_lockfile proof is required before protected state migration

maintenance_proof.node_or_failure_domain: replace-me: multi-zone, quorum, or managed equivalent failure-domain event

authority_separation: RBE CAS and action-cache are separate
